choice: Domain model: a Scenario is a named assumption set (retirement age, expenses, life expectancy, return/inflation distributions, tax, income streams, contributions). Running a Scenario produces a Forecast: frozen per-year percentile bands (p10/p25/p50/p75/p90 of total assets) plus success probability per age. Multiple Forecasts can coexist for comparison. Exactly one Scenario is designated the active Plan, whose Forecast is the tracking baseline. A Snapshot is a dated set of actual account balances from sync.
rationale: User confirmed structure, renamed Projection to Forecast, and wants multiple comparable Forecasts with a single active Plan
